export class HaircutSelectStyleComposer{constructor(offerId,hrCode){this._data=void 0;const id=Math.max(0,Math.floor(offerId||0));let sanitizedHr='';if(typeof hrCode==='string'&&hrCode.startsWith('hr-')){// Allow only digits and dashes after hr-
const safe=hrCode.replace(/[^0-9\-]/g,'');sanitizedHr='hr-'+safe.replace(/^hr-/,'');}this._data=[id,sanitizedHr];console.log('[📤] HaircutSelectStyleComposer packet sent:',this._data);}getMessageArray(){return this._data;}dispose(){return;}}
